title: Lime Green Tissue Paper Sheets for Wrapping 50 Large Sheets, Light Green Acid Free Art Paper, Perfect for Gift Wrap, Storage, Packing, Art & Craft Bulk Pack Archiving Shredding 70 x 50cm Sheet Size
features: BCreativetolearn Tissue Paper - Smooth, vibrant lime green tissue paper. Perfect for gift wrapping, presents, art and craft work. Each pack contains 50 large sheets.

50 Lime Green Tissue Paper Sheets - Each sheet of lime green tissue paper measures 70cm x 50cm. A perfect size for wrapping a gift or valuables. The tissue sheets are easy to cut for smaller projects or shredded for gift hampers.

Get Inspired - This strong and versatile, luxury tissue paper is 17gsm weight with consistent colour throughout each sheet. Use to make tissue pom poms, tissue flowers, table decor. Also great to use with wet strength tissue paper - layer over to add colour to your work.

Perfect Presentation - Large sheets of tissue paper are great for making amazing gift wrapping. Layer with other tissue paper colours for amazing effects. Use in gift boxes to protect and bring a gift to life. Add brightly coloured ribbons .
Acid Free Tissue Paper - This lime green tissue paper is acid free so great for archival work. Great for storing photographs, wrapping clothing and lining storage boxes.
description: Product Description Large Sheets of Lime Green Tissue Paper Large Vibrant Sheets Each sheet is smooth, consistently coloured and high quality. Sheets are 70 x 50 cm - a great size for wrapping, making crafts and archival work Perfect For Wrapping! Add vibrant gift ribbons to add a certain something to your amazing gift wrapping A bulk pack of lime green tissue paper sheets. Each sheet is easy to cut or rip so a little can go a long way. Perfect to create shredded tissue paper for gift boxes or hampers 17gsm this tissue paper is perfect for using alongside wet strength tissue paper for model making Try layering tissue to get an amazing effect Fuchsia Pink Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Jade Green Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Violet Purple Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Yellow Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Sky Blue Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Blue Tissue Paper 50 Large Wrap Sheets Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 19 4.4 out of 5 stars 76 4.3 out of 5 stars 8 4.6 out of 5 stars 15 4.5 out of 5 stars 8 4.7 out of 5 stars 4 Price £7.49 £ 7 . 49 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £6.35 £ 6 . 35 £7.48 £ 7 . 48 £7.29 £ 7 . 29 Colour Fuchsia Pink Jade Green Violet Yellow Sky Blue Blue
